sentences.arabic: صَادَفَتْ رِحْلَتِي مَهْرَجَانًا شَعْبِيًّا فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Moje putovanje se poklopilo s narodnim festivalom u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: My trip coincided with a local festival in the city.

sentences.translation: Ulice su bile ukrašene svjetlima i bojama.
sentences.translationEn: The streets were decorated with lights and colours.

sentences.arabic: عَزَفَتِ الْفِرَقُ الْمُوسِيقِيَّةُ فِي السَّاحَاتِ وَرَقَصَ النَّاسُ بِفَرَحٍ.
sentences.translation: Muzičke grupe su svirale na trgovima i narod je veselo plesao.
sentences.translationEn: Music bands played in the squares and people danced with joy.

sentences.arabic: جَرَّبْتُ الأَكْلَ الشَّعْبِيَّ مِنَ الأَكْشَاكِ الصَّغِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Probao sam narodnu hranu s malih tezgi.
sentences.translationEn: I tried local street food from small stalls.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ مِنْ حُسْنِ حَظِّي أَنِّي زُرْتُ الْمَدِينَةَ فِي هَذَا الْوَقْتِ.
sentences.translation: Bio sam sretan što sam posjetio grad baš u to vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: I was lucky to have visited the city at that time.
